params.name: list_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the list.

items.docs: Retrieves all custom fields that are accessible on a specific list. Returns field definitions including type, name, configuration, and possible values for dropdown and label fields.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: field_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the custom field.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If you want to reference a task by its custom task ID, this value must be true.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Required when custom_task_ids is set to true. The Workspace ID.

items.docs: Sets the value of a custom field on a task. The value format depends on the custom field type. For dropdown fields, provide the option order index. For label fields, provide an array of label IDs. For relationship fields, provide an array of task IDs.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: field_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the custom field.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If you want to reference a task by its custom task ID, this value must be true.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Required when custom_task_ids is set to true. The Workspace ID.

items.docs: Removes the value of a custom field from a task, resetting it to empty.
